actions.recordExtractor: ({$, url}) => {const title = $('h1').text() || $('title').text(); const description = $('meta[name="description"]').attr('content') || $('meta[property="og:description"]').attr('content') || ''; return [{objectID: url, title, description, url, content: $('article').text() || $('body').text()}]; }

default.recordExtractor: ({ $, url }) => { return [{ objectID: url, title: $('h1').text() || $('title').text(), content: $('article').text() || $('body').text(), url }]; }
